feature4_input_alias.json.description: Reject aliased input bindings on components and directives except when a directive selector explicitly exposes that alias.

cases.expected_output:
check=input_alias
failure_count=1
failure_index=0
message=In the class "SampleComponent", the directive input property "label" should not be renamed. However, you should use an alias when the directive name is also an input property, and the directive name doesn't describe the property. In this last case, you can disable this rule with `tslint:disable-next-line:no-input-rename`.
start_line=5
start_character=2
end_line=5
end_character=30

_constraints.output_rule: returns deterministic execution_error if json is invalid

_constraints.input_condition: input json action is not lint
_constraints.output_rule: returns normalized error without stack trace

_constraints.input_condition: json is valid but action != lint

_constraints.output_rule: outputs repeated failure blocks in report order

_constraints.input_condition: apply_fix=true and at least one finding has a mechanical fix

_constraints.output_rule: contains entire rewritten source between markers
validates selector prefix and case style against config

_constraints.input_condition: selector usage is other than element
_constraints.output_rule: no diagnostic for usage mismatch (only checked if config expects element)
